examples: He bursts out laughing—Coco is their dog.
They came to my clinic with their dying dog Coco.
I examined Coco and found he was old and had a serious illness.
The transgressive director, writer and trash connoisseur stopped by the bar Coco 66 in Brooklyn, N.
A-Rod is an investor in Vita Coco coconut water, but is not a paid spokesperson.
